subjected to few changes by the
foreman of the works, they are sent
out on regular runs. All are now ir
service excepting two. These are be-
ing changed and will be put on duty
in couple of days time The re.
naming cars are now on the road
and are expected to arrive shortly
Four of the new cars are for use or
the Lidgerwood Park line.


An important improvement that
the company will complete this week
is the East Sprague avenue loop
which means considerable saving
of time to the people.


Some time next week will see the
completion of the stub line which
runs on Indiana avenue north from
Monroe street to the Hillyard line
The avenue is now torn up and the
laying of the rails will be com
Tenced Immediately. About three
cars will be run over this stub
line, starting at the corner of Howard
street and Riverside avenue and
around the 1iillyard, Indiana, North
Monroe and Riverside route.
